jobs.title: Product Manager, Crypto Trading
jobs.location: Menlo Park, CA, New York, NY, Toronto, Canada
jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2>
<p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's strong experience in product management, platform reliability, analytics, and scaling, coupled with relevant technical skills and a clear interest in finance, makes them an excellent fit for this fintech Product Manager role at Robinhood, especially given their location in New York.

jobs.title: Product Manager II - Investment Office Product Management
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 4+ years of product management experience, including a Senior Product Manager role focused on analytics and reliability, combined with an MBA in Management & Information Systems, strongly aligns with the Product Manager II title and the need for robust product lifecycle management and analytical skills, even in an Investment Office context.

jobs.title: Senior Analyst, Product Management - Small Commercial
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 4.9 years of product management experience, strong analytical skills (SQL, Power BI, Looker), and background in platform reliability, risk, and governance align exceptionally well with a Senior Analyst, Product Management role, especially given the insurance domain.

jobs.title: Base Senior Product Manager, Trading Growth
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 4.8 years of product management experience, including 3.5 years as a Senior Product Manager, aligns perfectly with the seniority, and their strong background in analytics, platform reliability, and scaling strategies is highly relevant to a 'Trading Growth' role at Coinbase.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 5 years of product management experience, including a Senior Product Manager role and strong background in analytics platforms and reliability, aligns well with a Product Manager title; however, the absence of a detailed job description prevents a thorough assessment of specific skill and domain alignment.

jobs.title: Principal Product Manager, AI Features
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's strong product management expertise, extensive AI/ML project experience, technical skills, and background in platform reliability align well with the 'AI Features' focus of this role; however, the 'Principal' title likely signifies a higher seniority level (typically 7+ years) than the candidate's ~5 years of experience, and the job is onsite in a different city.
